title: Run Ledger Line
description: One line per queue item's full run — the master record that token_ledger.jsonl and skill_trust.jsonl entries hang off of. Written by the coordinator at done-transition, same as the other three ledgers (LOOP_POLICY.md).
$comment: Reconciled 2026-07-07: item_id now accepts the live AOS- id scheme (tools/aos-queue.py) alongside the legacy Q- scheme; lane/profile enums widened to the real owner-derived set (lane_profiles.json owners + workbench/unassigned + default route). Numbers still come from harness/API usage only.

memory_promotion.description: Explicit even if empty — never silently omitted, per MEMORY_PROMOTION_POLICY.md.
